creator: liangtai.s4@gmail.com
text:
WildMIDI is a simple softwre midi player which has a core
softsynth library that can be used with other applications.

Unfortunately I can't run properly its 'wildmidi' player
executable but made it crash with core-dumped file, even
using a version from /usr/portage/media-sound/wildmidi in
the Gentoo/Linux platform under the chroot'ed environment
on /usr/compat/linux.

I tested the library libWildMidi.so through the latest version of
qmmp player (the future update of PORTS/multimedia/qmmp),
and it works well.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
